title: Mini Market Simulation
description: A 2D simulation of a mini market where agents make economic decisions. Tracks supply, demand, and pricing dynamically in real time.

title: Dodge Master
description: Fast-paced 2D dodge game. Survive waves of incoming obstacles with increasing difficulty and speed.

title: KartBlitz
description: Top-down kart racing game with custom track generation and AI opponents.

title: Blob Game
description: Absorb smaller blobs and avoid larger ones. A cellular-automata-inspired survival game with procedural growth mechanics.

title: YOLO Object Detector
description: Custom-trained YOLOv8 model for real-time object detection. Trained on a custom dataset with a live webcam demo.

title: AI Hub
description: A central dashboard for running and testing multiple AI models. REST API backend with a clean frontend interface.
